resources.string:
Gukosora amabara birashobora kuba ingirakamaro mugihe ushaka:
  1.  Reba amabara neza
  2.  Gukuraho amabara kugira ngo bigufashe kwibanda kuri
Gukuramo ibyangombwa by\'ibikoresho bya USB kuri mudasobwa zose wamaze kwemeza?
Gushyira hamwe ibikoresho bishya ukoresheje kode y\'imibare itandatu
Hindura ibikoresho bishya ukoresheje scaneri ya QR code
Huza igikoresho ukoresheje kodi ya QR
Reba neza ko igikoresho cyashyizwe ku muyoboro umwe.
Ntagishoboye guhuza igikoresho. Cyangwa se QR code ntiyari ikwiriye, cyangwa se igikoresho nticyashyizwe ku muyoboro umwe.

Gukosora amakosa ya USB igenewe iterambere gusa. Koresha kugirango wandure amakuru hagati ya mudasobwa yawe n\'igikoresho cyawe, ushyire porogaramu ku gikoresho cyawe utiriwe ubimenyeshwa, kandi usome amakuru y\'ibiganiro.
Kwemerera gukosora amakosa binyuze kuri USB?
Reba neza ko%1$s ihujwe n\'urmuyoboro ukwiye
Kugirango urebe kandi ukoreshe ibikoresho biboneka, shiraho uburyo bwo kureba amakosa kumuyoboro udakoresha umugozi
Ihuze kuri Wi‑Fi usikannye kode ya QR
Ihuze kuri Wi‑Fi usikannye kode ya QR

Ibyimbitse ku kwinjira muri NFC bijyana gusa n\'impamvu zo kunoza imikorere. Koresha kugirango wandure amakuru hagati ya mudasobwa yawe n\'igikoresho cyawe, ushyire porogaramu ku gikoresho cyawe utiriwe ubimenyeshwa, kandi usome amakuru y\'ibiganiro.
Koresha uburyo bwo gukemura ikibazo cya wireless?

Wemerera iyi porogaramu gushyira inyibutsa no gutegura ibikorwa by\'igihe. Ibi bituma porogaramu ikora muburyo bwinyuma, bushobora gukoresha batiri nyinshi.\n\nNiba ubu burenganzira bufunze, inyibutsa zihari n\'ibihe bishingiye ku bikorwa byateganijwe na iyi porogaramu ntibikora.
Yemerera porogaramu gufungura ekara. Niba byemewe, porogaramu ishobora gufungura ecran igihe icyo aricyo cyose nta ntego yawe igaragara.
Amagenamiterere Y\'izina rya Interineti Ikoreshwa ntabashije kuboneka aha hakorerwa
Igenamiterere rituma sisitemu ya animasiyo yerekana ibimenyetso. Bisaba gushiraho porogaramu enableOnBackInvokedCallback muri dosiye y\'inyandiko.
Gushyiraho animasiyo ya sisitemu yo guhanura.
Hagarika ibiranga amajwi yuzuye ya Bluetooth mugihe habaye ibibazo byijwi hamwe nibikoresho bya kure nkamajwi ari hejuru muburyo bukabije butemewe cyangwa kubura kugenzura.
Hitamo Amajwi ya LHDC Kodek ya Burutufu:\n Amajwi Adatakara
Ntibyashobotse guhuza %1$skubera PIN cyangwa urufunguzo rw\'ibanga bitari byo.
Gushyira hamwe bibaha uburenganzira bwo kubona abo muvugana no guhamagara amateka igihe uhujwe.
Gukoresha umurongo wa interineti hamwe n\'igikoresho
Igipimo cy\'amajwi ya burutufu Kuri Icyitegererezo
Gukoresha kode y\'amajwi ya Burutufu \n Guhitamo: Igipimo amabayiti kucy\'icyitegererezo
Gukoresha kode y\'amajwi ya Burutufu \n Guhitamo: Uburyo bw\'umuyoboro
Kodeke y\'Amajwi ya LDAC ya Burutufu: Ubwiza bw\'Ibikinwa
Egeranya Amajwi ya LDAC ya Burutufu\nKodeke Yatoranyijwe: Ubwiza Bw\'ibikinwa
Hitamo Amajwi ya LHDC Kodek ya Burutufu:\nUbukererwe
Amajwi ya LHDC Kodek ya Burutufu: Ubwiza bw\'Ibikinwa
Hitamo Amajwi ya LHDC Kodek ya Burutufu:\n Ubwiza bw\'Ibikinwa
Gukoresha kode y\'amajwi ya Burutufu \n Guhitamo: Igipimo cy\'icyitegererezo
Gukoresha kode y\'amajwi ya Burutufu \n Guhitamo
Imvi-bisobanura kudashyigikirwa na terefone cyangwa gutegera
Garagaza ibikoresho bya Burutufu bitarimo amazina
Ibikoresho bya Bluetooth bidafite amazina (ni aderesi za MAC gusa) bizagaragazwa
Gufata ibigize ibice bya burutufu (Guhinduranya Burutufu nyuma yo guhindura iyi igenamiterere)
Niba usangiza %1$scyangwa uhindura ibisohoka, ibintu byawe usakaza bizahagarara
Umuyoboro wihuta wo gutanga raporo y\'ikosa
Erekana buto muri y\'imbonerahamwe yo kwatsa no kuzimya mu gufata raporo y\'ikosa
Igikoresho cyawe kigomba gusubukurwa kugira ngo iri hinduka rikore. Ongera usubiremo cyangwa uhagarike.
Gukuramo ibyangombwa byo gupima amakosa ya USB
UMUBURO:Ibikoresho byo kurinda igikoresho ntibikora kuri iki gikoresho mugihe iri koranabuhanga ryashyizweho.
Mu buryo bwikora bihujwe binyuze mumurongo utanga amanota
Uzi neza ko ushaka gusiba aya makuru asangiwe?
Mugihe tutagikurikirana hamwe nogukomeza kwinjirira, turasabwa gusiba amakuru yinjira mubikoresho byawe.
Ibi bipimo bigenewe gukoreshwa mu iterambere gusa. Bishobora gutuma igikoresho cyawe hamwe na porogaramu ziriho zihagarara cyangwa zikagenda nabi.
Amahitamo y\'uwatikoze ntabwo aboneka kuri uyu mukoresha
Icyitonderwa: Nyuma yo gufungura, iyi porogaramu ntishobora gutangira kugeza ufunguye terefone yawe
Koresha buri gihe GPU kugirango ukore inyandiko kuri ekara
Uburyo bwo gukosora igihe USB ihujwe
Uburyo bwo gukosora igihe Wi‑Fi ihujwe
Gushyiraho ibyiciro byo gukosora bya GPU
Kwemerera gutangiza ibyiciro bya GPU byo gukosora porogaramu
Gushoboza porogaramu ya terefone itanga igishishwa cyaho
Hiyongeramo ibyihariye by\'umucuruzi w\'iki gikoresho cy\'ikoranabuhanga ahatangirwa raporo, hashobora no kubamo amakuru y\'ibanga,gukoresha bateri nyinshi, cyangwa gukoresha ububiko bwinshi.
Wagerageje inshuro nyinshi zitarizo. Ayo makuru yose ari kuri icyo gikoresho azasibwa.
Wagerageje inshuro nyinshi zitarizo. Uyu mwirondoro wakazi hamwe namakuru yawo azasibwa.
Wagerageje inshuro nyinshi zitarizo. Uyu mukoresha azavanwaho.
Gusaba ko porogaramu zemererwa ku bikoresho byo hanze
Ituma porogaramu iyo ari yo yose yemerewe kwandikwa mu bubiko bw\'inyuma, hatitawe ku gaciro kaboneka
Gushyiraho 4x MSAA muri porogaramu za OpenGL ES 2.0
Kora ibikorwa byose bisubirwemo kumadirishya menshi, utitaye kumimerere igaragara.
Gushyiraho icyerekezo cya ecran kuri RTL kubirere byose
Ibi bizahanagura porogaramu zose n\' amakuru kuva ku cyiciro iriho cy\'umushyitsi
Urashobora kubika ibikorwa kuva muri ibi bikorwa cyangwa gusiba porogaramu zose hamwe namakuru
Ibikorwa byose bizasibangana igihe uzaba uvuyemo
Urashobora kubika cyangwa gusiba ibikorwa byawe igihe usohotse
Gusubizaho kugirango uhanagure ibikorwa biriho ubu, cyangwa urashobora kubika cyangwa gusiba ibikorwa mugihe uvuye
Ibi bizatangira umwanya mushya k\' umushyitsi kandi bihanagure porogaramu zose n\' amakuru kuva ku cyiciro iriho
Iyi ngenzuranyandiko ishobora kwakira amagambo yose wandika, harimo amakuru yawe bwite nk\'amagambobanga n\'imibare y\'ikarita ya banki. Bituruka muri porogaramu %1$s. Koresha ubu buryo bwo kwinjiza?
Kuzimya buri gikorwa cyose igihe cyose umukoresha akivaho
Mugaragaza ntizigera isinzira mugihe cyo kwinjiza umuriro
Kanda kugira ngo uhindure cyangwa ukureho ijambo ry\'ibanga ku bikoresho by\'ububiko bwuzuye
Ububiko bwuzuye bw\'amakuru byo kuri mudasobwa ntiburakingirwa
Buri giheshiraho interineti igendanwa, nubwo Wi‑Fi ikora (kugirango uhindure umuyoboro wihuse).
Ntibyashobotse kurangiza kwiyandikisha. kanda kugirango wongere ugerageze.
Bigomba kumara igihe kigera hafi kuri%1$s (%2$s)
Byagombye kumara igihe kigera hafi kuri %1$s hashingiwe ku buryo ukoresha (%2$s)
Byagombye kumara igihe kigera hafi kuri %1$s
Byagombye kumara igihe kigera hafi kuri %1$s hashingiwe ku buryo ukoresha
Seriveri ya DNS yihariye ntishobora kuboneka
Shyiramo izina rya host nirya DNS
Ikibazo muguhuza. Kuzimya no kongera gufungura igikoresho
Andika ijambo ry\'ibanga kugirango usubize kuburyo bwo mu ruganda mu buryo bw\'igerageza
Hitamo ingano zo kubika amakuru muburyo bwagategany
Guhitamo ububiko bw\'ibyinjira kugirango ubike igihe cyose ku gikoresho
Aya mahitamo ntabwo agikoreshwa. Ongera ugerageze indi nshuro.
Habayeho ikosa ryo gusiba amakuru asangiwe.
Nta masezerano yo gukodesha yashizwe kuri aya makuru asangiwe. Urashaka kugihanagura?
Nta makuru yatanzwe kuri uyu mukoresha.
Habayeho ikosa ryo gushaka amakuru asangiwe. Ongera ugerageze.
Erekana porogaramu idasubiza ikiganiro cya porogaramu z\'inyuma
Flash ibyuma byijimye mu ibara ry\'icyatsi iyo bivuguruye
Garagaza ibyahinduwe mu buryo bwo kureba
Kureba muburyo bwihuta imbere y\'idirishya iyo byashushanyijwe
Yerekana imbwirwaruhame kuri ecran iyo porogaramu ishyiraho imenyesha idafite umuyoboro ukwiriye
Kumurika impande zose z\'idirishya igihe zivuguruwe
Flash igihe porogaramu zikora ibikorwa birebire ku murongo w\'ibanze
Gushyiramo ibyuma byo kwihutisha interineti usangiza
Gushyiramo ibyuma byo kwihutisha interineti usangiza nimba bihari
Igenamiterere rya gusangiza interineti igendanwa ntiriboneka kuri uyu ukoresha
Gufata ko porogaramu zishyigikira imiterere igezweho
Gushyira ibara ry\'inyuma ry\'umurongo wo kuyobora mu buryo bw\'ibisanzwe
Gushyiraho ijwi ryihariye ry\'ururimi rw\'inyandiko yavuzwe
Bigira ingaruka ku majwi y\'amagambo avuzwe
Ururimi rusaba interineti ikora kugirango usohore inyandiko-ku-ijambo.

Iyi ngenzuranyandiko ishobora kwakira amagambo yose wandika,ibyo uvuga harimo amakuru yawe bwite nk\'amagambobanga n\'imibare y\'ikarita ya banki. bituruka ku mushakisha %s Ni gute twakoresha iyo porogaramu yo gusobanura imvugo?
Gushyiraho amakuru y\'ijwi akenewe mu gukora imvugo
Garagaza mu magambo make uko umuntu asobanura ibyo avuga
Gusubiza umurego aho inyandiko ivuga ku bisanzwe
Kuzimya inzira yihariye ku bikoresho by\'amajwi bya USB
Ushobora kugabanya uburyo bwo kugera kuri porogaramu n\'ibikubiye muri konti yawe
Abakoresha bafite porogaramu n\'ibikubiyemo byabo bwite

Urashobora gusangira iyi porogaramu n'abandi bantu mugushiraho abandi bakoresha. Buri mukoresha afite umwanya we bwite, bashobora kuwuhuza na porogaramu, amashusho mugaragaza, n'ibindi. Abakoresha bashobora kandi guhindura iboneza byikoresho nka Wi‑Fi bigira ingaruka kuri buri wese.

Iyo wongeyeho umukoresha mushya, uwo muntu aba akeneye gushyiraho umwanya we.

Umukoresha wese ashobora kuvugurura porogaramu ku bandi bakoresha. Gushyiraho na serivisi z'ububasha ntibishobora kwimurirwa ku mukoresha mushya.
Iyo wongeyeho umukoresha mushya, uwo muntu aba akeneye gushyiraho umwanya we.\n\nUmukoresha wese ashobora kuvugurura porogaramu ku bandi bakoresha.

Abayobozi bafite uburenganzira bwihariye abandi bakoresha badafite. Umuyobozi ashobora gucunga abakoresha bose, kuvugurura cyangwa gusubiramo iyi porogaramu, guhindura imiterere, kureba porogaramu zose zashyizweho, no guha cyangwa kuvanaho uburenganzira bw\'umuyobozi ku bandi.
Mbere yuko ushobora gukora umwirondoro wabujijwe, ugomba gushyiraho uburyo bwo gufunga ecran kugirango urinde porogaramu zawe n\'amakuru yawe bwite.
Reba neza ko uwo muntu ashobora gufata icyo gikoresho no gushyiraho umwanya we
Genzura porogaramu zashyizweho ukoresheje ADB/ADT ku myitwarire yangiza.
Amagenamiterere ya VPN ntashoboye kuboneka aha hakorerwa
Porogaramu ikosowe itegereje ko sisitemu ishyirwaho mbere yo gukora
Genzura ijambo ryibanga maze wongere ugerageze
Garagaza amahitamo ku cyemezo cyerekana imiyoboro idakoresha umugozi
Umuyoboro ugendanwa nta buryo bwo kugera kuri interineti
Gushyiraho adresi itari‑iya MAC idahamye ya Wi‑Fi
Iyo iyi moderi yashizweho, aderesi ya MAC y\'iki gikoresho ishobora guhinduka igihe cyose ihuza n\'urusobe rufite adresi ya MAC.
Bigabanya gukoresha batiri & byongera imikorere y\'umurongo
Ongera Wi‑Fi igipimo cyo kwinjiza, yerekana kuri SSID RSSI muri Wi‑Fi Picker
Iyi rezo yakira ID ya SIMUKADI ishobora gukoreshwa mu gukurikirana aho igikoresho giherereye. Menya byinshi
Ntibyashobotse kurangiza kwiyandikisha. kanda kugirango wongere ugerageze.
Seriveri ya DNS yihariye ntishobora kuboneka
Kanda kugirango wongere kwiyandikisha no guhuza
Genzura ijambo ryibanga maze wongere ugerageze
Yahujwe ku gikoresho. Ntishobora gutanga interineti.
Ntabwo iboneka hamwe n\'igenamiterere by\'umutekano bikoreshwa ubu
Ubushobozi bwa rezo bwarenze. Ongera ugerageze nyuma.
umuyoboro udakomeye Gerageza kwegera cyane igikoresho cy\'umuyoboro.
Umuyoboro ugendanwa nta buryo bwo kugera kuri interineti
Ntabwo uri bwongera kwumva inzogera ikurikira%1$s
ntuzumva indi nzongera %1$skeretse niba wazimya iyi mbere y\'aho
